Achievement!
♛
Rohan Shrestha
Creator & Developer
Passionate about strategy,
creativity & technology.

Hi, I'm the creator of Chess Royal — a platform built from my passion for strategy, creativity, and technology. I didn't just want to make another chess website; I wanted to create a space where players can truly enjoy the game, improve their skills, and experience chess in a more modern and engaging way.

Chess Royal is the result of my dedication to learning, building, and pushing my limits in web development. Every feature, design choice, and update reflects my effort to create something meaningful and enjoyable for users. I believe chess is more than just a game — it's a test of patience, intelligence, and decision-making, and I wanted this platform to represent that.

As a developer, I'm constantly exploring new ideas and improving my skills to make Chess Royal better with time. This is not just a project for me — it's something I take pride in and continue to grow. My goal is to keep evolving this platform, adding new features, and creating an experience that stands out.

"This is only the beginning."

💎 Earned
⚔️
Ranked Mode
Compete against real players · Earn ELO · Climb the tiers
⚡ How It Works
🎮
Free to play
No coins or bets needed. Ranked is completely free entry — just your skill on the line.
🔍
Matchmaking
We pair you with players near your ELO rating. The closer the match, the more accurate your rank.
⏱
Time control
Choose your preferred time format before searching. Both players play on the same time control.
📈 ELO Rating
✅
Win → gain ELO
Beat a stronger player = big ELO gain. Beat a weaker player = small gain.
❌
Lose → lose ELO
Lose to a weaker player = big ELO loss. Lose to a stronger player = small loss.
🤝
Draw → small change
Both players exchange a small amount of ELO based on expected outcome.
💡 Everyone starts at 1200 ELO. Your rating updates after every game.
🏅 Tiers & Rewards
♟
Pawn
0–999
♞
Knight
1000–1199
♝
Bishop
1200–1399
♜
Rook
1400–1599
♛
Queen
1600–1799
♚
King
1800+
💰
Win coins every match
Higher tiers earn more coins per win. King tier earns 150💰 per victory.
🏆
Season badges
Finish in the Top 10 of a season to earn a permanent badge on your profile.
💡 Tips for New Players
🧠
Practice against the AI first — complete Novice levels to build your fundamentals.
⏰
Watch the clock! Remember to press your clock after every move — or your time keeps running.
📉
Don't panic about losing ELO early. Your rating will settle to its true level within 10–20 games.
